generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled as Building Control System (BCS) components within BIM environments providing real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as foundational geometric model enriched with semantic data for Building Control System (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance MDETransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles transform enriched BIM models into structured representations for deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]

    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through continuous data integration for insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

    DTDFVocab:provides InfrastructureHealthForecastInsight
]

]

    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities across building lifecycle"

]

]

    base:desc "Infrastructure health and performance forecasting insights"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational optimization for energy efficiency"
]

instance LifecycleDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision-making support across building lifecycle stages"
]

    base:desc "Physical infrastructure control via interactive visualization interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure for AECO domain"

]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle spans initial device modeling in BIM environments by Building Control Engineers to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and generate deployable artifacts; real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for Facility Manager operations; and evolution through custom services developed by DT Engineers using standardized extension points."

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [

]
